Class Expirations<K>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.redis.core.types.Expirations<K>
public class Expirations<K> extends Object
Value Object linking a number of keys to their Expirations.TimeToLive retaining the order of the original source. Dedicated higher level methods interpret raw expiration values retrieved from a Redis Client.
  1. persistent() returns keys that do not have an associated time to live
  2. missing() returns keys that do not exist and therefore have no associated time to live
  3. ttl() returns the ordered list of expirations based on the raw values
  4. expiring() returns the expiring keys along with their time to live
Since:
3.5
Author:
Christoph Strobl, Mark Paluch

    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    Expirations.Timeouts
    Collection of timeouts associated with a TimeUnit.
    static class 
    Expirations.TimeToLive
    Expiration holds time to live Expirations.TimeToLive.raw() values as returned by a Redis Client.

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static <K> Expirations<K> of(TimeUnit targetUnit, List<K> keys, Expirations.Timeouts timeouts)
      Factory Method to create Expirations from raw sources provided in a given TimeUnit.
      Type Parameters:
      K - the key type used
      Parameters:
      targetUnit - the actual time unit of the raw timeToLive values.
      keys - the keys to associated with the raw values in timeToLive. Defines the actual order of entries within Expirations.
      timeouts - the raw Redis time to live values.
      Returns:
      new instance of Expirations.

    • persistent

      public Set<K> persistent()
      Returns:
      an ordered set of keys that do not have a time to live.

    • missing

      public Set<K> missing()
      Returns:
      an ordered set of keys that do not exist and therefore do not have a time to live.

    • ttl

      public List<Expirations.TimeToLive> ttl()
      Returns:
      an ordered set of all expirations where the Expirations.TimeToLive.value() is using the TimeUnit defined in timeUnit().

    • timeUnit

      public TimeUnit timeUnit()
      Returns:
      the TimeUnit for expirations held by this instance.

    • expiring

      public List<Map.Entry<K,Duration>> expiring()
      Returns:
      an ordered List of entries combining keys with their actual time to live. Missing and persistent entries are skipped.

    • keys

      public Collection<K> keys()
      Returns:
      the ordered collection of keys that are associated with an expiration.

    • expirationOf

      public @Nullable Expirations.TimeToLive expirationOf(K key)
      Parameters:
      key -
      Returns:
      the expirations where the Expirations.TimeToLive.value() is using the TimeUnit defined in timeUnit() or null if no entry could be found.

    • ttlOf

      public @Nullable Duration ttlOf(K key)
      Parameters:
      key -
      Returns:
      the time to live value of the requested key if it exists and the expiration is neither missing nor persistent, null otherwise.
